scripts.format: oxfmt --write bin lib providers scripts workflows test skills/sessions package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check bin lib providers scripts workflows test skills/sessions package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.lint: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json bin lib providers scripts workflows test skills/sessions package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json --fix bin lib providers scripts workflows test skills/sessions package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
